2403250.name: Armor Attack
2403250.description:
Armor Attack invites you to assemble your squad of sci-fi machines for intense PvP action! Lead robots, tanks, and hovers, each equipped with powerful weapons and unique abilities. Strategically combine these units to dominate the battlefield in a dynamic, evolving environment where every move matters.

COMBINE CLASSES AND ABILITIES IN YOUR ULTIMATE SQUAD

Having different classes of battle machines, each with unique abilities, enhances your tactical variety. Use area-of-effect attacks, block escape routes, go invisible for surprise strikes, or sneak fast with a turbo engine to accomplish the objective and lead your machines to victory.

MASTER YOUR WEAPON COMBINATIONS

Equip weapons designed for different vehicle classes to gain strategic advantages. Use homing weapons to bypass obstacles, ballistic weapons for long-range shots, and rotary cannons for quick, heavy damage. Each weapon can be upgraded for improved effectiveness and versatility. Upgrading your machines and weapons creates powerful combinations and various playstyles to help you adapt and succeed in battle.

CONQUER EVER-SHIFTING BATTLEFIELDS

Engage opponents on maps where positioning is key. Each map features dynamic elements that can shift battle outcomes, from changing landscapes to AI-controlled bosses, ensuring every encounter tests your skills.

FACTIONS FIGHTING FOR EARTH’S FUTURE

Choose between three factions, each representing a distinct playstyle: the Bastion, with high HP and defensive abilities for a defensive approach; the Hermits, designed for aggressive gameplay with powerful damage output; and the Empyreals, who reshape the battlefield through obstacles, spatial manipulation, and flying maneuvers for a scientific edge.
